name: hevy-api
description: TypeScript API client for Hevy fitness tracking app

scripts.build: bun run clean && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && bun build ./src/index.ts --target=node --format=esm --external=axios --sourcemap=external --outdir=dist --entry-naming=index.mjs && bun build ./src/index.ts --target=node --format=cjs --external=axios --sourcemap=external --outdir=dist --entry-naming=index.cjs
scripts.smoke:cjs: node -e "const pkg = require('./'); if (typeof pkg.default !== 'function' || pkg.Hevy !== pkg.default) throw new Error('CJS package exports mismatch');"
scripts.smoke:esm: node --input-type=module -e "import Hevy, { Hevy as Named } from 'hevy-api'; if (typeof Hevy !== 'function' || Named !== Hevy) throw new Error('ESM package exports mismatch');"
scripts.verify:ci: bun run build && bun run smoke:cjs && bun run smoke:esm && bun run lint && bun test && bun run typecheck && bun install --frozen-lockfile --dry-run && bun audit --production && bun run pack:dry-run

author: Mustafa Mohsen
